question_detail: Sends brief messages without follow-up. Sends media (images, documents, links) without text explanation. One emotional message: 'أنا جوعانه' with emoji.
active_hours_detail: Messages at 10:52, 11:22, 13:28, 14:50 (daytime cluster) and 02:14-02:26 (late night). Late-night messages were more emotional/casual.
dialect_detail: Gulf Arabic, very colloquial. Short messages. Uses emoji (🥹). Female speaker based on 'جوعانه' (feminine form).
interaction_frequency_detail: Sends in clusters of 2-3 messages then goes silent. Several messages with no text (media only). Low engagement with responses.
comprehension_detail: Rarely responds to explanations — sends media or short emotional statements. System has no confirmation she understood anything.
emotional_detail: Low emotional investment in conversations. Sends casual emotional expressions ('أنا جوعانه 🥹', 'الوووو', 'ايش', 'انت فيه') that read as testing the system rather than genuine engagement.
observed_patterns: Sends media without context — images, documents, links
Late night emotional message with emoji — possible loneliness signal
Never asked about AATIF's identity or services — just interacted
System gave generic responses to media — clear gap
